message: beads: add inline highlight e2e task

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-24q.16.1","title":"Inline Highlights: Hunk-to-DOM Mapping Strategy (Sentinels)","description":"Design + implement the mapping layer:
- Decide unit of highlighting: source line, paragraph block, list item, or code fence line.
- Approach: pre-process markdown to wrap candidate blocks/lines with sentinel markers that survive rendering, then locate those nodes in DOM to apply classes/styles.
- Ensure the approach handles headings, lists, code fences, tables (if supported), and inline code.
- Provide a "mapping debug" mode that can outline blocks and show their source ranges for troubleshooting.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:36.553768836Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:36.553768836Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.16.1","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.16","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:36.553768836Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.16.2","title":"Inline Highlights: Render Styles + Next/Prev Change Navigation","description":"Apply highlights and make them usable:
- Styles: subtle left bar + background for added blocks; outline for modified; optional bucket-color accent.
- Navigation: "Next change" / "Prev change" buttons; keyboard shortcuts on desktop; mobile big tap targets.
- Hover/tap on a highlighted block opens a tiny evidence popover (Δlines/tokens/lev + buckets).
- Must be stable across commit switches and when toggling between doc/diff views.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:43.557441538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:43.557441538Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.16.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.16","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:43.557441538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.16.3","title":"Inline Highlights: Unit Tests (Mapping + Highlight Application)","description":"Unit tests:
- Given synthetic markdown + diff hunks, assert the correct DOM blocks receive highlight classes.
- Duplicates: multiple identical lines; ensure highlights map to correct region deterministically.
- Code blocks: ensure syntax highlighting remains intact and highlights don't break code formatting.

Diagnostics
- On failure: dump the intermediate sentinel-marked markdown and a simplified DOM tree with highlighted nodes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:48.907215789Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:48.907215789Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.16.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.16","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:48.907215789Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.16.4","title":"Inline Highlights: E2E Tests (Toggle + Next Change + Stability)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Toggle inline highlights on; verify at least one highlighted block exists for a known commit with changes.
- Use next/prev change navigation; assert scroll position changes and highlight remains visible.
- Switch commit; highlights refresh correctly; no stale highlights remain.

Diagnostics
- Log commit idx/hash, highlight count, and current highlighted block id/path after each step.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:53.421054870Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:53.421054870Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.16.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.16","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:53.421054870Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.2","title":"Viz: Heading Mini-Map + Changed-Section Highlighting","description":"Add a left-side (desktop) / slide-over (mobile) heading mini-map generated from the rendered markdown, with per-commit indicators for which headings changed. Clicking a heading scrolls the doc pane; diff view can auto-scroll to first change under that heading.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.3","title":"Viz: Shareable Permalinks (URL State) + Copy Link","description":"Encode visualization state in the URL (commit idx, tab, resolution, metric, bucket filters). Add a Copy Link button. Deep links should load without needing any server logic.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.4","title":"Viz: Story Mode (Curated Milestones + Autoplay)","description":"Add an optional narrative layer: curated milestones (hand-picked commits) with short annotations and an autoplay scrubber. Desktop: right-side timeline card; Mobile: full-screen swipeable cards.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
